/usr/lib64/ccache/c++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libfawkesnetwork_logger.so -o /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesnetwork_logger.so CMakeFiles/fawkesnetwork_logger.dir/network_logger.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib -lstdc++ -lpthread /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesnetcomm.so -lavahi-common -lavahi-client -lcrypto /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesutils.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkeslogging.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkescore.so /usr/lib64/libboost_system.so.1.83.0 -L/usr/lib64 -llua-5.1 -lm -ldl -ltolua++ -lmagic -ldaemon -lstdc++ -lm -lrt -ldl -lpthread -luuid
